# Auto-Generated and Binary File Patterns

Files matching these patterns are automatically excluded from review.

## Auto-Generated Files (skip review)

- `*.lock`
- `package-lock.json`
- `yarn.lock`
- `pnpm-lock.yaml`
- `*.min.js`
- `*.min.css`
- `*.generated.*`
- `*.auto.*`
- `*_generated.*`
- `*.pb.go`
- `*.pb.ts`
- `*_pb2.py`
- `dist/`
- `build/`
- `out/`
- `.next/`
- `node_modules/`
- `vendor/`
- `__pycache__/`
- `*.pyc`
- `*.bundle.js`
- `*.chunk.js`
- `*.map`
- `Cargo.lock`
- `Gemfile.lock`
- `poetry.lock`
- `go.sum`
- `composer.lock`
- `coverage/`

## Binary Files (always skip)

- `*.png`
- `*.jpg`
- `*.jpeg`
- `*.gif`
- `*.ico`
- `*.webp`
- `*.bmp`
- `*.tiff`
- `*.woff`
- `*.woff2`
- `*.ttf`
- `*.eot`
- `*.otf`
- `*.pdf`
- `*.zip`
- `*.tar`
- `*.gz`
- `*.bz2`
- `*.7z`
- `*.rar`
- `*.wasm`
- `*.so`
- `*.dll`
- `*.dylib`
- `*.exe`
- `*.bin`
- `*.dat`
- `*.mp3`
- `*.mp4`
- `*.wav`
- `*.avi`
